# Fixture multi/b_reporting.txt — downstream reporting pipeline.
# Shares with a_ingestion.txt: WORKSTATION ETL_AGENT_01, CALENDAR WORKDAYS.
# REFRESH_REPORTS FOLLOWS file A's LOAD_FACTS — a cross-file FOLLOWS that
# only resolves when both files are parsed together.

CPUNAME ETL_AGENT_01
  DESCRIPTION "Shared ETL agent"
  OS UNIX
  NODE etl01.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
END

CPUNAME BI_AGENT_01
  DESCRIPTION "BI-only agent — unique to this file"
  OS UNIX
  NODE bi01.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
END

CALENDAR WORKDAYS "Business days"
  01/05/2026 01/06/2026 01/07/2026 01/08/2026 01/09/2026

PROMPT REPORT_SIGNOFF "Reports validated — release to BI?"

SCHEDULE BI_AGENT_01#REPORTING
  DESCRIPTION "Reporting refresh stream"
  ON RUNCYCLE WD_CYCLE CALENDAR WORKDAYS
  AT 0800
  PRIORITY 40
:
  REFRESH_REPORTS
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/bi/refresh.sh"
    STREAMLOGON bisvc
    FOLLOWS ETL_AGENT_01#INGESTION.LOAD_FACTS
    PROMPT REPORT_SIGNOFF

  PUBLISH_DASHBOARDS
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/bi/publish.sh"
    STREAMLOGON bisvc
    FOLLOWS REFRESH_REPORTS
END
